# ZeroKit.dev

> Free online developer tools and website analysis. 117 browser-based tools for developers including JSON formatter, regex tester, hash generator, CSS generators, and 8 server-side network analysis tools (DNS, SSL, WHOIS, tech detection). No signup required. All client-side tools process data locally in the browser.

ZeroKit.dev provides instant-use developer utilities organized into categories: formatters, encoders, generators, converters, CSS/design tools, color tools, text tools, network tools, DevOps/config generators, SEO tools, reference guides, and finance calculators. The site also features a Website Grader that scores any website on performance, security, SSL, SEO, and availability with an A+ to F grade.

## Tools

- [JSON Formatter](https://zerokit.dev/tools/json.html): Format, validate, and minify JSON
- [Regex Tester](https://zerokit.dev/tools/regex.html): Test regular expressions with live matching
- [Base64 Encoder](https://zerokit.dev/tools/base64.html): Encode and decode Base64 strings
- [Hash Generator](https://zerokit.dev/tools/hash.html): Generate MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256, SHA-512 hashes
- [JWT Decoder](https://zerokit.dev/tools/jwt.html): Decode and inspect JWT payloads
- [UUID Generator](https://zerokit.dev/tools/uuid.html): Generate v4 UUIDs
- [Password Generator](https://zerokit.dev/tools/password.html): Create strong passwords
- [QR Code Generator](https://zerokit.dev/tools/qrcode.html): Generate QR codes from text or URLs
- [Color Converter](https://zerokit.dev/tools/color.html): Convert between HEX, RGB, HSL
- [CSS Flexbox Generator](https://zerokit.dev/tools/flexbox.html): Visual Flexbox layout builder
- [CSS Grid Generator](https://zerokit.dev/tools/cssgrid.html): Visual CSS Grid builder
- [Gradient Builder](https://zerokit.dev/tools/gradient.html): Design CSS gradients visually
- [Website Grader](https://zerokit.dev/tools/grader.html): Score any website on performance, security, SSL, SEO
- [XML Formatter](https://zerokit.dev/tools/xml.html): Format, validate, and minify XML
- [Markdown to HTML](https://zerokit.dev/tools/md2html.html): Convert Markdown to HTML
- [cURL to Code](https://zerokit.dev/tools/curl2code.html): Convert cURL commands to code

## Network Analysis Tools (Server-Side)

- [DNS Lookup](https://zerokit.dev/tools/dns-lookup.html): Resolve A, AAAA, MX, PTR records
- [SSL Checker](https://zerokit.dev/tools/ssl-checker.html): Verify SSL certificates and expiry
- [HTTP Headers](https://zerokit.dev/tools/http-headers.html): Inspect HTTP response headers
- [WHOIS Lookup](https://zerokit.dev/tools/whois.html): Domain registration information
- [Website Status](https://zerokit.dev/tools/status-checker.html): Check if a website is up
- [Email Validator](https://zerokit.dev/tools/email-validate.html): Validate email via MX records
- [Tech Detector](https://zerokit.dev/tools/tech-detect.html): Detect website technology stack
- [Redirect Checker](https://zerokit.dev/tools/redirect-checker.html): Trace redirect chains

## Finance Calculators

- [Mortgage Calculator](https://zerokit.dev/tools/mortgage.html): Monthly payments with amortization
- [Compound Interest](https://zerokit.dev/tools/compound.html): Investment growth calculator
- [Salary Calculator](https://zerokit.dev/tools/salary.html): Annual/monthly/hourly conversion
- [Tax Estimator](https://zerokit.dev/tools/tax.html): US federal income tax brackets
- [ROI Calculator](https://zerokit.dev/tools/roi.html): Return on investment
- [BMI Calculator](https://zerokit.dev/tools/bmi.html): Body Mass Index with WHO categories

## Blog

- [How to Format JSON](https://zerokit.dev/blog/how-to-format-json.html): Guide to pretty-printing and validating JSON
- [What is Base64](https://zerokit.dev/blog/what-is-base64-encoding.html): Base64 encoding explained
- [JWT Tokens Explained](https://zerokit.dev/blog/jwt-token-explained.html): Understanding JSON Web Tokens
- [CSS Flexbox Guide](https://zerokit.dev/blog/css-flexbox-guide.html): Practical Flexbox tutorial
- [DNS Lookup Explained](https://zerokit.dev/blog/dns-lookup-explained.html): How DNS works
- [Regex Tutorial](https://zerokit.dev/blog/regex-tutorial-beginners.html): Regular expressions for beginners
- [SSL Certificates](https://zerokit.dev/blog/ssl-certificate-check.html): How to check SSL certificates
- [Hash Functions](https://zerokit.dev/blog/hash-functions-explained.html): MD5 vs SHA-256 explained

## HTTP Status Code Reference

- [HTTP 404](https://zerokit.dev/http/404.html): Not Found - causes and fixes
- [HTTP 500](https://zerokit.dev/http/500.html): Internal Server Error - troubleshooting
- [HTTP 502](https://zerokit.dev/http/502.html): Bad Gateway - causes and solutions
- [HTTP 503](https://zerokit.dev/http/503.html): Service Unavailable - what to do
- [HTTP 301](https://zerokit.dev/http/301.html): Moved Permanently - redirect guide
- [All HTTP Status Codes](https://zerokit.dev/http/index.html): Complete reference

## CSS Reference Guides

- [CSS Flexbox](https://zerokit.dev/css-ref/flexbox.html): Complete flexbox layout guide with examples
- [CSS Grid](https://zerokit.dev/css-ref/grid.html): CSS Grid layout reference
- [CSS Position](https://zerokit.dev/css-ref/position.html): relative, absolute, fixed, sticky explained
- [CSS Media Queries](https://zerokit.dev/css-ref/media-queries.html): Responsive breakpoints guide
- [CSS Variables](https://zerokit.dev/css-ref/variables.html): Custom properties tutorial
- [CSS Transitions](https://zerokit.dev/css-ref/transitions.html): Animation transitions reference
- [CSS Selectors](https://zerokit.dev/css-ref/selectors.html): Selectors cheatsheet
- [CSS Units](https://zerokit.dev/css-ref/units.html): px, em, rem, vh, vw comparison
- [All CSS Guides](https://zerokit.dev/css-ref/index.html): Complete CSS reference hub

## Website Security Report

- [2026 Website Security Report](https://zerokit.dev/blog/website-security-report-2026.html): We graded 20 major websites. Amazon got an F, Google a D, GitHub an A.

## UptimePulse - Free Website Monitoring

- [UptimePulse](https://65-109-129-230.sslip.io/pulse/): Free uptime monitoring with status pages and alerts
